source_jobs.title: Solutions Architect
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

We believe that open-source software, open standards and APIs are the greatest transformational tools for organizations in the modern software development era.



Our mission at Diagrid is to provide developers with APIs and tools that help them focus on their code and not on infrastructure. As online digital services need to handle more load and run on multiple clouds or on-premises environments, programming to higher level abstractions delivers consistent, secure and reliable code that is easily portable and helps organizations de-risk their projects.



Diagrid is founded by the creators of the Dapr https://dapr.io/ and KEDA https://keda.sh/ open-source projects, and who led the user experience, design and development of hyper-scale infrastructure cloud services, serverless platforms and open-source projects at Microsoft. Dapr has now achieved graduated status within the CNCF, joining renowned projects like Kubernetes, Prometheus, and Istio.



We are backed by top VC firms and supported with industry leading investors and advisors including Joe Beda (Kubernetes Co-Founder, former Co-Founder / CTO at Heptio) Matt Klein (Creator of Envoy, Lyft), Mark Russinovich (CTO, Microsoft Azure), William Morgan (Creator of Linkerd, CEO Buoyant), Seth Vargo (Senior Staff Engineer, Google), Adam Gross (Former CEO, Heroku), Sri Viswanath (Former CTO, Atlassian), Adam Frankl (Dev Marketing Expert, Neo4J & JFrog), and Roopak Venkatakrishnan (Head of platforms, Bolt).



The Role:

As a Solutions Architect at Diagrid, your goal is to quickly understand the customer's needs and pain points to design and implement solutions using open source and Diagrid technologies. You are an expert in listening to customers, understanding their needs and requirements, aggregating their feedback and writing code with them to successfully get them on a path of success using Diagrid products.



Your day-to-day consists of working with new prospective customers who are looking to use open-source Dapr in their solutions, whether these are existing brownfield or new greenfield applications, and then onboarding them to Diagrid Cloud. You will engage with users by creating and delivering customer demos, building Proof of Concept (PoC) solutions in a variety of programming languages and be providing architecture guidance on a broad set of technologies focused in the Cloud Native space. You will use your expert knowledge of cloud engineering and system design to help customers with their most important distributed system challenges.



The Solutions Architect is an integral part of the Engineering team. You will bring your knowledge and insights from these real world customer engagements to directly impact Diagrid products. You will be the voice of the customer in the company and work closely with the product team to scope product features and prioritize user feedback. You will inform the leadership team of where you see the biggest customer pain points and help identify opportunities. Your insights will be greatly valued and accounted for in both product and even strategic direction.



We’d especially love to hear from you if you have...

Prior experience working as a cloud architect or Technical Product Manager. Experience with modern application architectures and cloud-native development practices. Prior experience in a high-growth startup focusing on cloud and open source technologies.

We strongly uphold our values and culture and actively seek this out in all people applying to this position.

You'll love this job because...

 - You enjoy working to discover customer challenges and finding unique solutions using your technical expertise

 - You enjoy using a diversity of programming languages, developer frameworks and technologies, meeting customers with the technology they are using today and helping them adapt and adopt to the cloud and open source

 - You like gathering customer feedback across a wide range of users and scoping their issues an

source_jobs.title: Enterprise Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

We believe that open-source software, open standards and APIs are the greatest transformational tools for organizations in the modern software development era.



Our mission at Diagrid is to provide developers with APIs and tools that help them focus on their code and not on infrastructure. As online digital services need to handle more load and run on multiple clouds or on-premises environments, programming to higher level abstractions delivers consistent, secure and reliable code that is easily portable and helps organizations de-risk their projects.



Diagrid is founded by the creators of the Dapr https://dapr.io/ and KEDA https://keda.sh/ open-source projects, and who led the user experience, design and development of hyper-scale infrastructure cloud services, serverless platforms and open-source projects at Microsoft. Dapr has now achieved graduated status within the CNCF, joining renowned projects like Kubernetes, Prometheus, and Istio.



We are backed by top VC firms and supported with industry leading investors and advisors including Joe Beda (Kubernetes Co-Founder, former Co-Founder / CTO at Heptio) Matt Klein (Creator of Envoy, Lyft), Mark Russinovich (CTO, Microsoft Azure), William Morgan (Creator of Linkerd, CEO Buoyant), Seth Vargo (Senior Staff Engineer, Google), Adam Gross (Former CEO, Heroku), Sri Viswanath (Former CTO, Atlassian), Adam Frankl (Dev Marketing Expert, Neo4J & JFrog), and Roopak Venkatakrishnan (Head of platforms, Bolt).

 


ABOUT THE TEAM:

We are looking for Enterprise Account Executives to help accelerate our go-to-market efforts at Diagrid. The team consist of talented and passionate professionals with an entrepreneurial spirit to hunt, farm and grow the business.

 

Diagrid builds solutions for developers, platform engineers and security teams. Dapr (dapr.io http://dapr.io) is an important foundation to the Diagrid solution providing customers with APIs that abstract away the complexity of common challenges when building distributed applications so they can focus on business value and keep code lean and portable. Diagrid Catalyst is our SaaS and BYOC product helping customers make AI agents reliable and secure.

 

This role is remote but the hires must be located in: (1) SF / Bay Area; (2) New York; and/or (3) London, UK.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE:

We’re looking to expand our sales team by hiring an Enterprise Account Executive who has experience and is passionate about selling technical solutions to engineering and security teams.

 

As an Enterprise Account Executive, you will be responsible for driving revenue growth through the acquisition of new enterprise clients, startups and digital natives. In addition, you will be on-point for expanding existing relationships with current customers.

 

As an early Enterprise Account Executive for Diagrid, you will have the opportunity to influence the strategy of our go-to-market team and represent the ‘voice of the customer’ to influence the direction of our product.

 

You’ll be a brand ambassador with customers and with teammates alike. You will have many opportunities for cross-functional collaboration with partners in marketing, customer success, and product. We’re looking for an experienced, self-starter who can hit the ground running, is passionate about talking to customers, and can wear multiple hats in these early days of unlocking business.

 


RESPONSIBILITIES:

 - New Customer Acquisition: Meet and exceed revenue targets, with a focus on acquiring new customers within the developer community. Proactively source new leads and new business opportunities to ensure a robust pipeline. Evangelize Diagrid’s products to new customers.

 - Customer Relationship Management:
   
   - Build and maintain strong, long-lasting relationships with key customers. Act as the main point of contact for client inquiries and ensure customer satisfaction.
   
   - Present the value of Diagrid software to senior executives mainly across techni

source_jobs.title: Developer Advocate
source_jobs.description:
WHO WE ARE:

We believe that open-source software, open standards and APIs are the greatest transformational tools for organizations in the modern software development era.



Our mission at Diagrid is to provide developers with APIs and tools that help them focus on their code and not on infrastructure. As online digital services need to handle more load and run on multiple clouds or on-premises environments, programming to higher level abstractions delivers consistent, secure and reliable code that is easily portable and helps organizations de-risk their projects.



Diagrid is founded by the creators of the Dapr https://dapr.io/ and KEDA https://keda.sh/ open-source projects, and who led the user experience, design and development of hyper-scale infrastructure cloud services, serverless platforms and open-source projects at Microsoft. Dapr has now achieved graduated status within the CNCF, joining renowned projects like Kubernetes, Prometheus, and Istio.



We are backed by top VC firms and supported with industry leading investors and advisors including Joe Beda (Kubernetes Co-Founder, former Co-Founder / CTO at Heptio) Matt Klein (Creator of Envoy, Lyft), Mark Russinovich (CTO, Microsoft Azure), William Morgan (Creator of Linkerd, CEO Buoyant), Seth Vargo (Senior Staff Engineer, Google), Adam Gross (Former CEO, Heroku), Sri Viswanath (Former CTO, Atlassian), Adam Frankl (Dev Marketing Expert, Neo4J & JFrog), and Roopak Venkatakrishnan (Head of platforms, Bolt).




ABOUT THE TEAM

The Developer Experience team at Diagrid is obsessed with making distributed applications radically simpler and more reliable for developers worldwide. We steward the wildly popular open-source Dapr project (CNCF) while driving adoption of Diagrid’s commercial platform (Diagrid Catalyst) that brings production-grade reliability and security for AI agents.

Our mission is to make AI agents reliable and secure for the Dapr and Diagrid community. We create inspiring demos, technical content, events, and tools that turn developers into advocates and help them ship faster, more resilient systems.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Developer Advocate based in the San Francisco Bay Area, you will be the public face and community heartbeat of Dapr and Diagrid. You’ll own community growth, content creation, and developer engagement end-to-end. This is a high-impact, high-visibility role for someone who loves coding in public, building communities, and turning complex distributed systems + AI agent concepts into approachable, delightful experiences.

You will report work closely with Engineering, Product, Marketing, Sales, and the broader open-source maintainer team.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Grow the Dapr OSS Community: Drive contributor growth, engagement, and adoption metrics across GitHub, Discord, and other channels.

 - Moderate & Nurture the Ecosystem: Actively moderate the Dapr Discord (and future community platforms), answer technical questions, recognize contributors, and foster a welcoming, high-signal environment.

 - Create Compelling Content: Write high-quality blog posts for the Dapr blog and Diagrid Catalyst, produce tutorials, architectural guides, and sample applications showcasing Dapr + AI agents, workflows, state management, service invocation, and more.

 - Lead Webinars & Live Sessions: Proactively plan and deliver technical webinars, workshops, and live demos on a regular cadence.

 - Manage YouTube & Video Presence: Own the Dapr/Diagrid YouTube channel — script, record, edit, and publish videos, demos, and recordings of community events.

 - Coordinate Events & Meetups: Help organize and host Dapr Meetups, Dapr Days, conference talks, and community events in the Bay Area and globally (with travel as needed).

 - Build Diagrid Demos & Tools: Create sample applications, starters, and reference architectures that demonstrate best practices for Dapr in production and AI agent use cases.

 - Gather Feedback & Influence Product: Act as the voice of
